shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '260,350p' src/hooks/utils.js && sed -n '1,180p' src/hooks/__tests__/utils.get-highlighted-index.js 2>/dev/null || true && find src -path '*utils*highlight*' -o -path '*utils*test*' | head -40"
/bin/bash -lc "rg --files src/hooks | rg 'utils.*test|test.*utils|__tests__/utils' && rg -n \"getInitialHighlightedIndex\" test src | head -80"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,150p' src/hooks/useCombobox/utils.js && sed -n '1,150p' src/hooks/useSelect/utils.ts && sed -n '1,130p' src/hooks/useCombobox/reducer.js && sed -n '1,150p' src/hooks/useSelect/reducer.js"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"function getNonDisabledIndex|const getNonDisabledIndex|export.*getNonDisabledIndex|getHighlightedIndexOnOpen\\(\" src/utils.js src/hooks/utils.js src/hooks -g '*.js' && sed -n '280,420p' src/utils.js && sed -n '1,100p' src/__tests__/utils.get-highlighted-index.js"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"const defaultProps|defaultProps =|isItemDisabled\" src/hooks/utils.js src/hooks/reducer.js | head -40 && sed -n '1,70p' src/hooks/reducer.js && sed -n '620,650p' src/hooks/utils.js && sed -n '400,470p' src/utils.js"
